mechanics.reasoningSummary: Official posts before the replay acquisition date document multiple Urn changes, including a June 4 rework and June 11 follow-up. No source binds those posts to build 23916427, so applicability remains a date-supported candidate.
limitations: No replay telemetry proves Urn state was active.
Comeback/aura/reward details remain rule-specific and cannot be merged synthetically.

mechanics.reasoningSummary: Current secondary documentation identifies Mid Boss, but no direct build or official candidate rule for build 23916427 was established in this task.
limitations: No Mid Boss replay telemetry for replay 009.
Mid Boss defeat remains distinct from Rejuvenator claim.

mechanics.reasoningSummary: Current secondary documentation identifies Rejuvenator, but build 23916427 applicability and exact effect rules remain unresolved.
limitations: Mid Boss death must not be treated as Rejuvenator benefit.

mechanics.reasoningSummary: Official June 11 notes include bounty/economy-related changes before the replay acquisition date, but exact field semantics for build 23916427 remain unresolved. Replay 009 exposes m_iGoldNetWorth only.
limitations: Net worth does not validate secured, unsecured, spendable, or reward-source semantics.

mechanics.reasoningSummary: Replay 009 validates death lifecycle consistency and official June 11 notes include kill comeback bounty changes, but death timers, soul loss, and Rejuvenator interactions are not mapped for build 23916427.
limitations: No direct death timer or soul-consequence validation.

mechanics.reasoningSummary: Official May 22 notes include Guardian-related structure mechanics before the replay acquisition date, but structure state detection for replay 009 is not implemented and exact build mapping remains unresolved.
limitations: No objective/structure lifecycle extraction for replay 009.
